data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The requirement for validation rules (regex, min/max, required) is not fully satisfied as the evidence only covers five out of the eight specified field types. Specifically, there is no evidence for the field types: date, multi-select, URL, and color picker, which are necessary to confirm the completeness of the validation rules. This indicates a clear gap in the requirement coverage as outlined in the linked use case.
gaps: Missing evidence for field types: date, multi-select, URL, and color picker.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
